taxonomy: Gomesa imperatoris-maximiliani is classified as a species of orchid. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within the Orchidaceae family, Gomesa imperatoris-maximiliani is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Gomesa is itself part of the tribe Cymbidieae. The species is native to Brazil.
